# Italian Estate

> Independent research on Italy property investment for US, UK, and European buyers.

- Site: https://italian-estate.com
- Contact: info@italian-estate.com
- Markets: Tuscany, Puglia (Ostuni), Milan, Lake Como, Sicily
- Focus: flat tax (€300k/yr from 2026), cadastral due diligence, STR licensing, foreign buyer share (~5% turnover)
- Not a developer, not a listing portal

## Collections (scaffold — content publishing next)
- /guides/
- /projects/
- /areas/
- /compare/
- /developers/
- /news/

## Full corpus
https://italian-estate.com/llms-full.txt
